ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "preferred_unit" TEXT /* Preferred unit of measurement (metric/imperial) */,
  "notification_settings" TEXT /* Notification settings for the user */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* Privacy settings for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 'Marathon 2023') */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., 'marathon', 'triathlon') */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each split */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the split belongs to */,
  "split_name" TEXT /* Name of the split (e.g., '5K', '10K') */,
  "split_time" TEXT /* Time taken to complete the split */,
  "mile_marker" REAL /* Mile marker for the split (if applicable) */,
  "elevation_gain" REAL /* Elevation gain for the split in meters */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Pace for the split (min/km or min/mile) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the split */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_splits_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who achieved the performance */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the performance belongs to */,
  "overall_time" TEXT /* Overall time taken to complete the event */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* Splits times achieved during the event (as a string) */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Overall pace for the event (min/km or min/mile) */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Average heart rate during the event */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Number of calories burned during the event */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the performance */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_performances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrition_and_hydration" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition/hydration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who consumed the nutrition/hydration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event during which the nutrition/hydration was consumed */,
  "nutrition_type" TEXT /* Type of nutrition or hydration consumed (e.g., 'water', 'energy_bar') */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of nutrition or hydration consumed */,
  "time_taken" TEXT /* Time at which the nutrition or hydration was consumed */,
  "split_id" INTEGER /* ID of the split during which the nutrition/hydration was consumed */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the nutrition/hydration */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value (e.g., carbohydrates, proteins, fats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_and_hydration_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_and_hydration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nutrition_and_hydration_split_id FOREIGN KEY ("split_id") REFERENCES event_splits ("split_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the goal */,
  "target_distance" REAL /* Target distance for the goal in kilometers */,
  "target_time" TEXT /* Target time for the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for the goal */,
  "current_progress" REAL /* Current progress towards the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the performance */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance shared */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the performance was shared with */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge the performance was shared in */,
  "shared_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was shared */,
  "shared_time" TEXT /* Time the performance was shared */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the social interaction (e.g., shared, joined, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES event_performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose health data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the health data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the health data entry */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate in beats per minute */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure in mmHg */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure in mmHg */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Sleep quality (e.g., excellent, good, fair, poor) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
